a:r.a:t: Future-state comparison - AVEVA wins by orchestrating the full assurance loop
Proposed open AVEVA control plane versus NAPA, Siemens / Dassault PLM and other ship design tools
Distinctive position = Siemens-grade configuration + Dassault-grade collaboration + NAPA-grade assurance, connected by customer-owned APIs and AVEVA lifecycle context.
Future-state concept comparison; proposed capabilities require pilot validation and class / customer agreement.
